idea-plugin.name: Golden Diff
idea-plugin.description:
Golden Diff helps Android and Kotlin developers review screenshot-test changes directly in Android Studio or IntelliJ-based IDEs, without leaving the editor.

Open the tool window for the screen you are editing and it lists the matching screenshot goldens, then compares the committed git HEAD version against your working copy or generated test output — in four modes: side-by-side (2-up), swipe, onion skin, and a pixel-diff heatmap.

It is tool-agnostic and works with PNG outputs from Roborazzi, Paparazzi, Compose Preview Screenshot Testing, Shot, Dropshots, and similar screenshot-test tools — just point it at the golden directory.

  • Match goldens to the file you are editing in two modes: by annotated preview/test method, or by a file/class regex — matched against each golden's path, so nested layouts work too.
  • Live preview in Settings shows how many and which goldens match the current file.
  • Compare Git HEAD with working-copy goldens.
  • Compare Git HEAD with generated test output such as _actual.png files.
  • Configure golden and generated-output directories, the matching rule, and excluded golden suffixes per project.
  • Review changes in side-by-side, swipe, onion-skin, and pixel-diff modes.
  • Zoom (Fit / 50–400%) and scroll large screenshots.
  • When a golden is identical to the selected source, the comparison is skipped and a single preview is shown.

Works with IntelliJ Platform 2024.1 and newer (build 241+), including recent Android Studio releases — no upper build limit.
